steps.title: Match evidence to assumption
steps.content: The linguist assumes that "know" appears often in written English. Corpus data showing that "know" is the eighth most commonly used verb supports that assumption, so the blank needs a word meaning to back up with evidence.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice B means to require as a logical consequence. Choice C means to reverse or move. Choice D means to disprove, the opposite of what the data does. The remaining word means to support with evidence. The answer is A.
